title: GlamRays 20 Pack Happy Birthday Napkins Blue and Silver Theme Disposable Paper Napkins for Dinner Picnic Cocktail Birthday Party Supplies Decoration for Men Women
features: 【Package Contents】You will receive 20 blue and silver napkins, size 16.5cm x 16.5cm. A sufficient quantity to meet your party needs; perfect for your indoor and outdoor blue and silver birthday decorations

【Elegant Design】The blue birthday decorations feature a novel and unique design. Blue and silver are not only mature and stable but also full of vitality; printed with 'Happy Birthday' lettering in the centre with bows, fireworks, gift boxes, and other delightful birthday themes
【High Quality】These blue and silver birthday napkins are made from premium, durable paper, printed with beautiful patterns and colours, and they do not fade easily

【Applications】The blue and silver party napkins can be used for both indoor and outdoor blue and silver birthday parties, birthdays, baby showers, gender reveal parties, happy birthday parties, or other fun celebrations

【Purchase with Confidence】If you have any questions about the birthday napkins, support will be provided. We will respond within 24 hours and offer a return or exchange service to ensure a risk-free purchase
